attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_ID       ,
 XXCFIR.APPLICATION_NAME     ,
 XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID       ,
 XXCFIR.LEDGER_ID   ,
 XXCFIR.ORG_ID      ,
 XXCFIR.TRX_CLASS   ,
 XXCFIR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
 XXCFIR.TRX_NUMBER,
 XXCFIR.TRX_DATE    ,
 XXCFIR.TRX_LINE_ID ,
 XXCFIR.TRX_LINE_NUM,
 XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE   ,
 XXCFIR.CUST_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
 XXCFIR.CUSTOMER_ID ,
 XXCFIR.PARTY_ID    ,
 XXCFIR.PARTY_SITE_ID        ,
 XXCFIR.PERIOD_YEAR ,
 XXCFIR.PERIOD_NUM  ,
 XXCFIR.UNIT_PRICE  ,
 XXCFIR.AMOUNT      ,
 XXCFIR.CURRENCY_CODE        ,
 XXCFIR.HEADER_ID   ,
 XXCFIR.ORDER_NUMBER,
 XXCFIR.ORDER_LINE_ID        ,
 XXCFIR.ORDER_QUANTITY       ,
 XXCFIR.CANCEL_QUANTITY      ,
 XXCFIR.QUANTITY_INVOICED    ,
 XXCFIR.SO_BOOKED_DATE       ,
 XXCFIR.SO_LINE_NUM ,
 XXCFIR.SO_SHIPMENT_DATE     ,
 XXCFIR.SKU,
 XXCFIR.EXPIRATION_DATE      ,
 XXCFIR.ORDER_RMA_STATUS     ,
 XXCFIR.PROCESS_STATUS       ,
 XXCFIR.ELEMENT_TYPE,
 XXCFIR.RULE_START_DATE,
 XXCFIR.RULE_END_DATE ,
 XXCFIR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
 XXCFIR.ERROR_MESSAGE        ,
 XXCFIR.CREATION_DATE        ,
 XXCFIR.CREATED_BY  ,
 XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE     ,
 XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATED_BY      ,
 XXCFIR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN    ,
 XXCFIR.REQUEST_ID  ,
 XXCFIR.PROG_APPL_ID,
 XXCFIR.PROG_ID     ,
 XXCFIR.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE1  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE2  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE3  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE4  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE5  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE6  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE7  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE8  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE9  ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE10 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE11 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE12 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE13 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE14 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE15 ,
 XXCFIR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE16 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE17 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE18 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE19 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE20 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE21 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE22 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE23 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE24 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE25 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE26 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE27 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE28 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE29 ,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE30 , /*START:BELOW ARE THE EXTRA COLUMNS RQD APART FROM CSPP-VIP COLS*/
 XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE47,              
 XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE48,              
 XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE49,              
 XXCFIR.DATE_ATTRIBUTE50,
 XXCFIR.NUM_ATTRIBUTE54, /*END*/ 
 XXCFIR.TRAIL_FILE_NAME      ,
 XXCFIR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE      ,
 XXCFIR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME   ,
 XXCFIR.REFRESH_DATETIME     ,
 XXCFIR.PROCESSED_FLAG,
 XXCFIR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE40,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE41,
 XXCFIR.ATTRIBUTE42
 
 FROM
 (
 SELECT XXCFIR.* FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXTRACT_ALL  XXCFIR
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
 ON XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
 WHERE  (UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME)  IN ('CISCO RESIDUAL CREDITS'))
 AND EFAR.LANG = 'US'
 AND XXCFIR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY XXCFIR.TRANSACTION_ID, XXCFIR.APPLICATION_ID ORDER BY XXCFIR.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 )XXCFIR
 WHERE XXCFIR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
